sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_values (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT id, toUInt16OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_values SET value = '30000' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toUInt16OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
